eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Clark, WA; Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; at 12:18 PM on JAN 3, 2019 Effective until 2:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a practice demo warning issues by Clark Regional Emergency Services Agency.
